headline: Greg Abel’s First Big Move as Berkshire CEO Had Warren Buffett’s Personal Approval
summary: Many investors expected Greg Abel to rock the boat and make significant changes to Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B), but that has not been the case. Instead, he has been following in the footsteps of his predecessor. His first big move was discussed with Warren Buffett, and it was restarting share buybacks. Berkshire restarted repurchases for the first ... Greg Abel’s First Big Move as Berkshire CEO Had Warren Buffett’s Personal Approval

headline: New CEO Shelves Breakup — Is Kraft Heinz Finally a Turnaround Stock Worth Owning?
summary: Packaged-food giants have spent 2026 dodging two big headwinds: GLP-1 drugs that shrink appetites for snacks and store brands that steal share on price. Organic sales across the sector have turned negative for the second straight year. Yet Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) just hit pause on the very breakup Wall Street once cheered. New CEO Steve Cahillane, ... New CEO Shelves Breakup — Is Kraft Heinz Finally a Turnaround Stock Worth Owning?

headline: Keurig Dr Pepper picks Peet’s CEO to helm coffee spinoff
summary: Rafael Oliveira will lead the newly created Global Coffee Co. once it separates from the beverage giant.

headline: Unilever’s Grocery Deal with McCormick Draws Sour Reaction from Investors
summary: Tuesday’s deal would see Unliver “sharpening” into a $45 billion “pure play” in global beauty, wellness, and personal and home care.
